name: Antique Key
description: A rusty key with a history, unlocking secrets from the past that no one has dared to open in years.

name: Antique Key
description: A rusty key with a history, unlocking secrets from the past that no one has dared to open in years.

name: Antique Teacup
description: A vintage teacup with delicate patterns, holding the echoes of many warm conversations and sips of tea.

name: Ash
description: The soft, powdery remnants of a fire that once burned brightly.

name: Azurite
description: A brilliant blue stone that sparkles with the colors of the sky, a symbol of wisdom and clarity.

name: Branch Dead
description: A lifeless branch, fallen to the ground after many years of standing tall.

name: Candy Cane
description: Bright red and white stripes twist together in a festive curve, carrying the sweet scent of winter cheer. A simple holiday treat that feels like Christmas folded into candy.

name: Charcoal
description: A black, porous material created from burning wood, used in both art and fuel.

name: Coal Hard
description: A dense, compact piece of coal, perfect for a long, slow burn.

name: Coconut Oil
description: A tropical oil with a smooth texture and subtle flavor, used for cooking, skincare, and everything in between.

name: Coral Stone
description: A smooth, pinkish stone formed by coral, a symbol of the vibrant life beneath the waves.

name: Feather
description: A light, delicate feather, fluttering in the breeze, often a sign of a bird's presence.

name: Fishbone
description: A slender, sharp bone from a fish, often left behind after a meal.

name: Flax
description: A soft, fiber-rich plant, used to create linen and other durable fabrics.

name: Foxtail
description: A soft, fluffy tail that twitches with every movement, often belonging to a fox or similar creature.

name: Fur
description: A soft and luxurious coat, keeping creatures warm in the coldest climates.

name: Gold Ore
description: A shiny mineral that's both rare and valuable, a symbol of wealth just waiting to be mined.

name: Gravion Chunk
description: A solid mass of Gravion, sturdy but unworked.

name: Gravion Crystal
description: A flawless block of Gravion, famed for unmatched defense.

name: Gravion Shard
description: Rough fragments of Gravion, heavy and irregular.

name: Halite
description: A crystal form of salt, sparkling like tiny stars, essential for life and flavor.

name: Hibiscus
description: A bright, tropical flower, known for its large, colorful blooms that brighten up any space.

name: Ingot Iron
description: A strong, dense block of iron, perfect for forging tools and weapons.

name: Ingot Steel
description: A refined steel ingot, tough and durable, used in the creation of many valuable items.

name: Larva
description: A tiny, wriggling creature that will soon transform into something much more impressive.

name: Leaf
description: A green, delicate leaf that flutters in the wind, a symbol of nature's endless cycle.

name: Lunaris Chunk
description: A smooth Lunaris chunk, shimmering with quiet magic.

name: Lunaris Crystal
description: A pristine Lunaris crystal, radiant with celestial energy.

name: Lunaris Shard
description: Pale lunar fragments that glow faintly in darkness.

name: Marble
description: Smooth, cold, and shiny, like the Earth's treasure chest waiting to be discovered.

name: Moonrock
description: A mysterious rock, as if it's traveled all the way from the moon itself.

name: Moonstone
description: Glimmering with an ethereal glow, it's like holding a piece of moonlight.

name: Mushroom
description: Soft and earthy, this little fungus grows in the shadows of the forest floor.

name: Obsidian
description: A sleek, glass-like stone, smooth as night and sharp as a shadow.

name: Oceanite
description: A stone as deep as the ocean, swirling with shades of blue and green.

name: Pearl
description: A tiny, precious gem, formed deep within the ocean's secretive embrace.

name: Potato
description: Earthy and hearty, the potato is the perfect food for any occasion.

name: Pouch Fairy Dust
description: A tiny pouch filled with magical fairy dust, ready to sprinkle some charm.

name: Pumpkin
description: Round and golden-orange, the pumpkin glows with the warmth of harvest season. Its cheerful charm makes it perfect for Halloween mischief and cozy autumn nights.

name: Seed
description: A tiny promise of growth, holding potential in its fragile shell.

name: Silica Sand
description: A fine, smooth sand, glistening like tiny crystals under the sun.

name: Spider Web
description: Delicate and intricate, a work of art spun from nature's finest threads.

name: Swamp Eels
description: Slithery and sleek, these eels move smoothly through the murky swamp waters.

name: Tar
description: A thick, sticky substance, dark as night, ready for the earth's embrace.

name: Tin
description: A soft, malleable metal, perfect for creating with a touch of care.

name: Tree Bark
description: Rough and textured, the bark tells stories of the tree's life.

name: Tree Sap
description: Sweet and sticky, it's the lifeblood of the tree, full of natural goodness.

name: Tungsten
description: Strong and unyielding, a metal that refuses to bend or break.

name: Vulkanite Chunk
description: A raw chunk of Vulkanite, hot with latent power.

name: Vulkanite Crystal
description: A perfected Vulkanite crystal, channeling devastating force.

name: Vulkanite Shard
description: Jagged splinters of Vulkanite, scorching to the touch.
